titleStmt.title: SII 18.39: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 39. (B.K. No. 5 of 1933-34.) BANKДЂPUR, BANKAPUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Stone set up in front of the Government farm office.

summary.p: This fragmentary inscription is dated in Ељaka 915, Vijaya, JyД“shб№­ha Е›u. 3, Friday. In the year cited there were two JyД“shб№­has, and the tithi Е›u. 3 fell in those months, on April 27, A.D. 993, Thursday and May 26, Friday, f.d.t. В·04. The latter apparently is the intended date.

It mentions ЕљЕЌbhnarasa as governing BanavДЃsi-dД“Е›a and the division of Two Sixhundreds. This ЕљЕЌbhanarasa is probably the same as the feudatory of Taila II and Iб№џivabeбёЌaб№…ga SatyДЃЕ›raya of the Later ChДЃlukya family of KalyДЃб№‡a (Cf. Bombay Karnatak Inscriptions, Vol. I, pt. I, Nos 47 and 50).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:

manДЃбё·uttire . sakanб№›pakДЃбё·ДЃtД«tasaб№Ѓvatsarada sa
taб№Ѓgaбё· 915 daneya vijaya saб№Ѓvatsaraб№Ѓ pravartti
se tadvarб№ЈДЃbhyantara jД“б№Јб№­a sudda tadige Е›ukravДЃradandu
Digital edition of SII 18.39 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
